## Hotfix Summary

<!-- Critical issue being addressed in production -->

## Incident Reference

<!-- Link to incident ticket, postmortem, or monitoring alert -->

## Severity

- [ ] P0 — Service down / data loss risk
- [ ] P1 — Major functionality impaired
- [ ] P2 — Degraded performance / workaround exists

## Root Cause

<!-- Brief description of what went wrong -->

## Fix

<!-- What this hotfix changes -->

## Target Branch

- [ ] `main` (cherry-pick to release branch after merge)
- [ ] Release branch: `release/`

## Verification in Production

<!-- How was / will this be verified after deployment? -->

## Rollback Plan

<!-- Steps to roll back if the hotfix causes issues -->

## Follow-Up

<!-- Issues or tasks to address properly after the hotfix -->

- [ ] Create follow-up issue for permanent fix
- [ ] Schedule postmortem (if P0/P1)

## Checklist

- [ ] Fix is minimal and scoped to the incident
- [ ] Reviewed by on-call engineer or team lead
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] Release branch cherry-pick planned
